parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
const fm = d.financialModel || {};

// Map pipeline data to presentation sections
const presentation = {
  brandName: d.brandName || d.company || 'Brand',
  contactName: d.contactName || `${d.firstName || ''} ${d.lastName || ''}`.trim(),
  email: d.email || '',
  phone: d.phone || '',
  category: d.category || '',
  productName: d.productName || '',
  productDescription: d.productDescription || '',
  differentiation: d.differentiation || '',
  memberValue: d.memberValue || '',
  competitors: d.competitors || '',
  revenue: d.revenue || '',
  retailer: d.retailer || "Sam's Club",
  
  // Pricing
  msrp: d.msrp || '',
  samsPrice: d.samsPrice || '',
  landedCost: d.landedCost || '',
  vendorMargin: d.vendorMargin || '',
  
  // Readiness signals
  has20PctValue: d.has20PctValue || '',
  consignmentReady: d.consignmentReady || '',
  multiClub: d.multiClub || '',
  
  // Scores
  score: d.score || 0,
  readinessScore: d.readinessScore || 0,
  
  // Financial model
  revenuePerEvent: fm.revenuePerEvent || 0,
  year1Projection: fm.year1Projection || 0,
  year2Projection: fm.year2Projection || 0,
  roi: fm.roi || 0,
  recommendedShowLength: fm.recommendedShowLength || '4 days',
  recommendedClubCount: fm.recommendedClubCount || 100,
  projectedUnitsPerEvent: fm.projectedUnitsPerEvent || 0,
  grossMarginPct: fm.grossMarginPct || 0,
  breakEvenEvents: fm.breakEvenEvents || 0,
  
  // Pipeline ID for folder lookup
  id: d.id || '',
  phase: 6,
  presentationRequestedAt: new Date().toISOString()
};

return [{ json: presentation }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 3000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Generate a structured Roadshow 2026 presentation brief for Sam\'s Club Category 63 Pop-Up Shop program. Return ONLY valid JSON with these exact keys. Brand: ' + $json.brandName + '. Category: ' + $json.category + '. Product: ' + $json.productName + '. Description: ' + $json.productDescription + '. Differentiation: ' + $json.differentiation + '. Member Value: ' + $json.memberValue + '. Competitors: ' + $json.competitors + '. Revenue Tier: ' + $json.revenue + '. Sam\'s Price: $' + ($json.samsPrice || 'TBD') + '. Landed Cost: $' + ($json.landedCost || 'TBD') + '. Margin: ' + ($json.vendorMargin || 'TBD') + '%. 20% Value Advantage: ' + $json.has20PctValue + '. Revenue/Event: $' + $json.revenuePerEvent + '. Y1 Projection: $' + $json.year1Projection + '. ROI: ' + $json.roi + '%. Recommended Clubs: ' + $json.recommendedClubCount + '. Show Length: ' + $json.recommendedShowLength + '. Return JSON: { "executiveSummary": "2-3 sentence brand pitch for buyer", "valueProposition": "why Sam\'s members will love this (3 bullets)", "competitiveAdvantage": "how this beats alternatives (3 bullets)", "roadshowStrategy": "recommended approach for in-club activation", "seasonalStrategy": { "q3": "Aug-Oct focus", "q4": "Nov-Jan focus", "q1": "Feb-Apr focus", "q2": "May-Jul focus" }, "staffingRecommendation": "staffing approach", "riskFactors": "2 key risks to watch" }' }] }) }}

parameters.subject: =Roadshow 2026 Presentation Ready: {{ $json.brandName }}
parameters.message:
=

Roadshow 2026 Presentation Generated

A buyer-ready presentation has been auto-generated for {{ $json.brandName }} and saved to their Google Drive folder.

Brand Summary

Category{{ $json.category }}
Product{{ $json.productName }}
Pipeline Score{{ $json.score }}/100
Readiness Score{{ $json.readinessScore }}/100
Revenue/Event${{ $json.revenuePerEvent || 'TBD' }}
Y1 Projection${{ $json.year1Projection ? ($json.year1Projection / 1000000).toFixed(1) + 'M' : 'TBD' }}

AI-Generated Content

Executive Summary: {{ $json.slideContent.executiveSummary }}

Next Steps

  1. Review the generated presentation in the brand's Drive folder
  2. Customize any sections as needed
  3. If using the PPTX generator: run node generate-from-pipeline.js with brand data for polished slides
  4. Submit to Sam's Club buyer with the two-pager

meta.description: Auto-generates Roadshow 2026 presentation from pipeline brand data. Uses Claude to create buyer-facing content (executive summary, value proposition, competitive analysis, seasonal strategy). Saves to brand's Drive folder, updates master sheet, emails team for review.
